item.title: Measuring the impact of AI on software engineering – with Laura Tacho
item.description:
Check out this article: [Measuring the impact of AI on software engineering – with Laura Tacho][1]

Note: Since this is an automatically created post there is no commentary on it other than any minimal notes I may have included. Read it and do your own critical thinking. I may get around to adding some/more of my own thoughts or categorizing it… but maybe not. Should the article be behind a paywall let me know and I will figure out a way to get it to you.[1]: https://pca.st/episode/a0927348-175d-4ab9-b5c1-683315149b97
